61 A1100B_INTRPTR_LANG_TXT A1100B_INTRPTR_LANG_TXT A1100B Preferred Language CHAR 15 This column contains the resident's preferred language. discontinued 09/30/2023
62 A1200_MRTL_STUS_CD A1200_MRTL_STUS_CD A1200 Marital Status Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's marital status. -=Not assessed/no information
1=Never married
2=Married
3=Widowed
4=Separated
5=Divorced
